summary: Completed testing of Select component bug fix (P0). All Select components across the application now display ONLY the selected value without placeholder concatenation. The fix in select.jsx using [&>span]:contents CSS class is working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: The fix in select.jsx (line 27) using [&>span]:contents CSS class correctly forces display:contents on child spans, preventing the Radix placeholder and selected value from concatenating
seed_data_creation: Created test user for Select bug verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Select component bug (placeholder + value concatenation) has been fixed and verified. The fix is in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/select.jsx line 27 using [&>span]:contents CSS class.

select_bug_test_results.bug_description: Select components were displaying placeholder AND selected value concatenated (e.g., 'Choisir une catégorieMaçonnerie' instead of just 'Maçonnerie')
select_bug_test_results.fix_applied: SelectTrigger in select.jsx now wraps children in a span with class '[&>span]:contents' to force display:contents on child spans
select_bug_test_results.overall_status: ALL TESTS PASSED - Bug is FIXED
